29697:                 ${makeFloatButton('transportWatcher', '7', 'Transport', 'Show/hide amber transport-required watchers beside missions. Shortcut: 7', 'Transport', 'Trans')}
29698:                 ${makeFloatButton('unitCommitment', '8', 'Unit Count', 'Show your committed units beside missions. Shortcut: 8', 'Unit Count', 'Count')}
29699:                 ${makeFloatButton('criticalView', '9', 'Crit View', 'Show only personal missions aged 8 hours or more and frame them on the map. Shortcut: 9', 'Critical View', 'Critical')}
29700:                 ${makeActionFloatButton('open-vehicle-status', 'V', 'Veh Codes', 'Open or close Vehicle Code Status. Shortcut: V', 'Veh Codes', 'Codes')}
29701:                 ${makeActionFloatButton('open-critical-drawer', 'W', 'Age Watch', 'Open or close Mission Age Watch. Shortcut: W', 'Age Watch', 'Watch')}
29702:             </div>
29703:             <div class="mcms-screen-pins" title="Pinned screen shortcuts"></div>
29704:         `;
29705:         ['click', 'dblclick', 'mousedown', 'mouseup', 'pointerdown', 'pointerup', 'pointercancel', 'touchstart', 'touchmove', 'touchend', 'wheel', 'contextmenu'].forEach(eventName => {
29706:             control.addEventListener(eventName, stopMapInteraction, { passive: false });
29707:         });
29708:         let screenPinLongPressTimer = 0;
29709:         let screenPinLongPressButton = null;
29710:         const cancelScreenPinLongPress = () => {
29711:             runtimeClearTimeout(screenPinLongPressTimer);
29712:             screenPinLongPressTimer = 0;
29713:             screenPinLongPressButton = null;
29714:         };
29715:         control.addEventListener('pointerdown', event => {
29716:             const pinButton = closestEventTarget(event, '.mcms-screen-pin-btn[data-full-label]');
29717:             if (!pinButton || event.pointerType === 'mouse') return;
29718:             cancelScreenPinLongPress();
29719:             screenPinLongPressButton = pinButton;
29720:             screenPinLongPressTimer = runtimeSetTimeout(() => {
29721:                 if (screenPinLongPressButton !== pinButton) return;
29722:                 pinButton.dataset.mcmsLongPress = 'true';
29723:                 showToast(pinButton.dataset.fullLabel || pinButton.textContent || 'Bookmark');
29724:             }, 560);
29725:         });
29726:         control.addEventListener('pointermove', cancelScreenPinLongPress, { passive: true });
29727:         control.addEventListener('pointercancel', cancelScreenPinLongPress, { passive: true });
29728:         control.addEventListener('pointerup', () => {
29729:             runtimeClearTimeout(screenPinLongPressTimer);
29730:             screenPinLongPressTimer = 0;
29731:             screenPinLongPressButton = null;
29732:         }, { passive: true });
29733:         control.addEventListener('click', event => {
29734:             const menuButton = closestEventTarget(event, '.mcms-menu-btn');
29735:             const dockToggleButton = closestEventTarget(event, '.mcms-dock-toggle-btn');
29736:             const toggleButton = closestEventTarget(event, '[data-toggle]');
29737:             const actionButton = closestEventTarget(event, '[data-action]');
29738:             if (actionButton?.dataset.mcmsLongPress === 'true') {
29739:                 delete actionButton.dataset.mcmsLongPress;
29740:                 event.preventDefault();
29741:                 return;
29742:             }
29743:             if (menuButton) { togglePanel(); return; }
29744:             if (dockToggleButton) { toggleCommandBar(); return; }
29745:             if (toggleButton) { toggleFeature(toggleButton.dataset.toggle); return; }
29746:             if (actionButton) handleAction(actionButton);
29747:         });
29748:         control.addEventListener('contextmenu', event => { event.preventDefault(); openPanel(); });
29749:         host.appendChild(control);
29750:         control.classList.toggle('mcms-control-fallback', !mapEl);
29751:         renderScreenPins();
29752:         updateUI();
29753:         return control;
29754:     }
29755: 
29756:     function createPanel() {
29757:         const existingPanel = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.panelId);
29758:         if (existingPanel) { settingsPanelActivated = true; return existingPanel; }
29759:         const panelStartedAt = startupClock();
29760:         settingsPanelActivated = true;
29761:         const panel = document.createElement('div');
29762:         panel.id = SCRIPT.panelId;
29763:         panel.setAttribute('role', 'dialog');
29764:         panel.setAttribute('aria-modal', 'false');
29765:         panel.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
29766:         panel.setAttribute('aria-label', `${SCRIPT.name} menu`);
29767:         const buildUiThemeButtons = () => UI_THEME_ORDER.map(key => {
29768:             const theme = UI_THEMES[key];
29769:             return `
29770:                 <button class="mcms-ui-theme-btn" type="button" data-ui-theme="${key}" title="${escapeHtml(theme.description)}" aria-pressed="false">
29771:                     <span class="mcms-ui-theme-preview mcms-ui-theme-preview-${key}" aria-hidden="true"><span></span><span></span><span></span></span>
29772:                     <span class="mcms-ui-theme-copy"><strong>${escapeHtml(theme.label)}</strong><small>${escapeHtml(theme.short)}</small></span>
29773:                 </button>
29774:             `;
29775:         }).join('');
29776:         const buildThemeButtons = keys => keys.map(key => {
29777:             const theme = THEMES[key];
29778:             return `
29779:                 <button class="mcms-theme-btn" type="button" data-theme="${key}" title="${theme.full}">
29780:                     <span class="mcms-iconbox">${theme.icon}</span>
29781:                     <span class="mcms-text">
29782:                         <span class="mcms-label">${theme.label}</span>
29783:                         <span class="mcms-pill">${theme.short}</span>
29784:                     </span>
29785:                 </button>
29786:             `;
29787:         }).join('');
29788:         const uiThemeButtons = buildUiThemeButtons();
29789:         const coreThemeButtons = buildThemeButtons(CORE_THEME_ORDER);
29790:         const serviceThemeButtons = buildThemeButtons(SERVICE_THEME_ORDER);
29791:         const positionButtons = Object.entries(POSITIONS).map(([key, pos]) => `<button class="mcms-position-btn" type="button" data-position="${key}" title="${pos.label}">${pos.short}</button>`).join('');
29792:         panel.innerHTML = `
29793:             <div class="mcms-panel-sticky-stack">
29794:                 <div class="mcms-header">
29795:                     <div class="mcms-drag-handle" title="Hold left-click and drag this bar to move the menu">
29796:                         <span class="mcms-title">☰ DRAG MENU HERE</span>
29797:                         <span class="mcms-subtitle">Hold left-click on this title area. Position saves.</span>
29798:                     </div>
29799:                     <button class="mcms-reset-panel" type="button" data-action="panel-reset" title="Reset menu position">↺</button>
29800:                     <button class="mcms-help-button" type="button" data-action="open-help-center" title="Open searchable Help Centre" aria-label="Open searchable Help Centre">?</button>
29801:                     <button class="mcms-close" type="button" title="Close">×</button>
29802:                 </div>
29803:                 <div class="mcms-tabs">
29804:                     <button class="mcms-tab-btn" type="button" data-tab="skins">Skins</button>
29805:                     <button class="mcms-tab-btn" type="button" data-tab="tools">Tools</button>
29806:                     <button class="mcms-tab-btn" type="button" data-tab="resources">Resources</button>
29807:                     <button class="mcms-tab-btn" type="button" data-tab="ops">Ops</button>
29808:                     <button class="mcms-tab-btn" type="button" data-tab="payouts">Payouts</button>
29809:                     <button class="mcms-tab-btn" type="button" data-tab="discord">Finance</button>
29810:                     <button class="mcms-tab-btn" type="button" data-tab="places">Places</button>
29811:                     <button class="mcms-tab-btn" type="button" data-tab="settings">Settings</button>
29812:                 </div>
29813:             </div>
29814:             <section class="mcms-tab-panel" data-panel="skins">
29815:                 <div class="mcms-section-label">Interface theme</div>
29816:                 <div class="mcms-ui-theme-grid">${uiThemeButtons}</div>
29817:                 <div class="mcms-status mcms-ui-theme-status">Interface themes restyle the complete toolkit without changing your selected operational map skin.</div>
29818:                 <div class="mcms-section-label">Core skins</div>
29819:                 <div class="mcms-grid-2">${coreThemeButtons}</div>
29820:                 <div class="mcms-section-label">Emergency services</div>
29821:                 <div class="mcms-grid-2">${serviceThemeButtons}</div>
29822:                 <div class="mcms-status">Fire Command, Police Tactical, Medical Control and Coastal Command use lightweight local tile filters and remain compatible with map overlays.</div>
29823:                 <div class="mcms-section-label">Automatic day / night</div>
29824:                 <div class="mcms-grid-2">
29825:                     ${makeToggleButton('autoNight', '◑', 'Auto Night', 'Automatically switch operational map skins at the configured day and night times.')}
29826:                 </div>
29827:                 <div class="mcms-row"><span class="mcms-row-label">Night starts</span><input class="mcms-input" type="time" data-setting="auto-night-start"></div>

29979:                 <input class="mcms-hidden-file" type="file" accept="application/json,text/json,.json" data-import-finance-file>
29980:                 <div class="mcms-finance-vault-summary" data-finance-vault-summary></div>
29981:                 <div class="mcms-status mcms-discord-status" data-finance-vault-status data-tone="neutral">Local Financial Archive ready.</div>
29982:                 <div class="mcms-status mcms-discord-status" data-finance-rule-status data-tone="neutral">Built-in financial intelligence active.</div>
29983:                 <div class="mcms-status">GitHub hosts public transaction-classification rules and audit policy only. The Toolkit never uploads player ledger data, Discord webhooks or repository credentials. The local archive is indexed by MissionChief player ID/name and can be transferred between devices using Export Archive / Import Archive or the complete private Toolkit backup.</div>
29984:                 <div class="mcms-status mcms-finance-private-note">Private backup warning: Export All includes your Discord webhook and locally stored MissionChief financial history. Anyone holding the file may post through the webhook and inspect the exported game ledger.</div>
29985:             </section>
29986:             <section class="mcms-tab-panel" data-panel="places">
29987:                 <div class="mcms-section-label">Quick jumps + screen shortcuts</div>
29988:                 <div class="mcms-quick-list"></div>
29989:                 <div class="mcms-section-label">Custom bookmarks + screen shortcuts</div>
29990:                 <div class="mcms-bookmark-list"></div>
29991:                 <div class="mcms-section-label">Saved Map Profiles</div>
29992:                 <div class="mcms-profile-list" data-profile-list></div>
29993:                 <div class="mcms-status">Profiles store your map location, zoom, skin, visibility filters and operational overlays.</div>
29994:             </section>
29995:             <section class="mcms-tab-panel" data-panel="settings">
29996:                 ${operationalWindowSettingsMarkup()}
29997:                 <div class="mcms-section-label">Device layout</div>
29998:                 <div class="mcms-row"><span class="mcms-row-label">Mobile Mode · iOS Safari</span><select class="mcms-select" data-setting="mobile-mode"><option value="auto">Auto detect iPhone</option><option value="on">Always on</option><option value="off">Always off</option></select></div>
29999:                 <div class="mcms-row"><span class="mcms-row-label">Tablet Mode</span><select class="mcms-select" data-setting="tablet-mode"><option value="auto">Auto detect</option><option value="on">Always on</option><option value="off">Always off</option></select></div>
30000:                 <div class="mcms-status" data-device-layout-status>Detecting device layout…</div>
30001:                 <div class="mcms-status">Mobile Mode is tuned for iPhone Safari with Tampermonkey: a map-aware 5×2 command grid in portrait, a compact single-row dock where space allows, full-width safe-area bottom sheets, 16px form controls to prevent Safari input zoom, and Visual Viewport handling for the iOS keyboard. Tablet and desktop layouts remain separate and unchanged.</div>
30002:                 <div class="mcms-section-label">Dock position</div>
30003:                 <div class="mcms-position-grid">${positionButtons}</div>
30004:                 <div class="mcms-desktop-position-controls">
30005:                     <div class="mcms-section-label">Fine nudge</div>
30006:                     <div class="mcms-nudge-grid">
30007:                         <button class="mcms-small-btn" type="button" data-action="nudge-left">←</button>
30008:                         <button class="mcms-small-btn" type="button" data-action="nudge-up">↑</button>
30009:                         <button class="mcms-small-btn" type="button" data-action="nudge-down">↓</button>
30010:                         <button class="mcms-small-btn" type="button" data-action="nudge-right">→</button>
30011:                         <button class="mcms-small-btn" type="button" data-action="nudge-reset">0</button>
30012:                     </div>
30013:                     <div class="mcms-status mcms-nudge-value">X 0 / Y 0</div>
30014:                     <div class="mcms-section-label">Menu panel</div>
30015:                     <div class="mcms-nudge-grid">
30016:                         <button class="mcms-small-btn" type="button" data-action="panel-left">←</button>
30017:                         <button class="mcms-small-btn" type="button" data-action="panel-up">↑</button>
30018:                         <button class="mcms-small-btn" type="button" data-action="panel-down">↓</button>
30019:                         <button class="mcms-small-btn" type="button" data-action="panel-right">→</button>
30020:                         <button class="mcms-small-btn" type="button" data-action="panel-reset">↺</button>
30021:                     </div>
30022:                 </div>
30023:                 <div class="mcms-section-label">Input</div>
30024:                 <div class="mcms-grid-2">
30025:                     ${makeToggleButton('shortcuts', '⌨', 'Keys', 'Keyboard shortcuts on/off. Map tools: 1–9. Vehicle Codes: V. Mission Age Watch: W. Menu: M.')}
30026:                 </div>
30027:                 <div class="mcms-row"><span class="mcms-row-label">Major incident threshold</span><select class="mcms-select" data-setting="major-incident-minimum"><option value="10000">10,000+ credits</option><option value="25000">25,000+ credits</option><option value="50000">50,000+ credits</option><option value="100000">100,000+ credits</option></select></div>
30028:                 <div class="mcms-section-label">Economy Mode</div>
30029:                 <div class="mcms-status mcms-economy-status">Use the leaf button beside the map-menu opener. Economy Mode preserves every module while reducing animations, map-layer pressure and background refresh frequency.</div>
30030:                 <div class="mcms-section-label">Settings Backup</div>
30031:                 <div class="mcms-config-actions">
30032:                     <button class="mcms-small-btn" type="button" data-action="export-config" title="Export every toolkit setting, private integration, profile, bookmark and Financial Archive history" aria-label="Export all toolkit settings">Export All</button>
30033:                     <button class="mcms-small-btn" type="button" data-action="import-config" title="Import a current or legacy toolkit settings backup" aria-label="Import all toolkit settings">Import All</button>
30034:                     <button class="mcms-small-btn" type="button" data-action="reset-config">Reset</button>
30035:                 </div>
30036:                 <input class="mcms-hidden-file" type="file" accept="application/json,text/json,.json" data-import-config-file>
30037:                 <div class="mcms-status">Backups include every persistent toolkit preference, desktop/Tablet/iOS layout choice, profile, bookmark, saved Discord webhook and local Financial Archive history. A clear private-file warning is shown before export and import. Store the JSON securely. Current and legacy toolkit backup files are supported.</div>
30038:             </section>
30039:             <div class="mcms-footer">
30040:                 <span>Audited runtime: compact Smart Bookmark Labels, responsive modes and every interface theme remain fully preserved.</span>
30041:                 <span class="mcms-build">${SCRIPT.name} v${SCRIPT.version} · MIT · ${SCRIPT.author}</span>
30042:             </div>
30043:         `;
30044:         const tabList = panel.querySelector('.mcms-tabs');
30045:         if (tabList) tabList.setAttribute('role', 'tablist');
30046:         panel.querySelectorAll('.mcms-tab-btn').forEach(button => {
30047:             const tab = button.dataset.tab;
30048:             button.id = `mcms-tab-${tab}`;
30049:             button.setAttribute('role', 'tab');
30050:             button.setAttribute('aria-controls', `mcms-tabpanel-${tab}`);
30051:             button.setAttribute('aria-selected', 'false');
30052:             button.tabIndex = -1;
30053:         });
30054:         panel.querySelectorAll('.mcms-tab-panel').forEach(tabPanel => {
30055:             const tab = tabPanel.dataset.panel;
30056:             tabPanel.id = `mcms-tabpanel-${tab}`;
30057:             tabPanel.setAttribute('role', 'tabpanel');
30058:             tabPanel.setAttribute('aria-labelledby', `mcms-tab-${tab}`);
30059:             tabPanel.hidden = true;
30060:         });
30061:         panel.addEventListener('keydown', event => {
30062:             const current = closestEventTarget(event, '.mcms-tab-btn');
30063:             if (!current || !['ArrowLeft', 'ArrowRight', 'Home', 'End'].includes(event.key)) return;
30064:             const buttons = Array.from(panel.querySelectorAll('.mcms-tab-btn'));
30065:             const currentIndex = Math.max(0, buttons.indexOf(current));
30066:             const nextIndex = event.key === 'Home' ? 0
30067:                 : event.key === 'End' ? buttons.length - 1
30068:                 : (currentIndex + (event.key === 'ArrowRight' ? 1 : -1) + buttons.length) % buttons.length;
30069:             event.preventDefault();
30070:             const nextButton = buttons[nextIndex];
30071:             setActiveTab(nextButton.dataset.tab);
30072:             nextButton.focus({ preventScroll: true });
30073:         });
30074:         panel.addEventListener('click', event => {
30075:             const closeButton = closestEventTarget(event, '.mcms-close');
30076:             const tabButton = closestEventTarget(event, '.mcms-tab-btn');
30077:             const uiThemeButton = closestEventTarget(event, '.mcms-ui-theme-btn');
30078:             const themeButton = closestEventTarget(event, '.mcms-theme-btn');
30079:             const toggleButton = closestEventTarget(event, '[data-toggle]');
30080:             const positionButton = closestEventTarget(event, '.mcms-position-btn');
30081:             const actionButton = closestEventTarget(event, '[data-action]');
30082:             const operationalAction = closestEventTarget(event, '[data-operational-action]');
30083:             if (operationalAction && handleOperationalWindowAction(operationalAction)) { event.preventDefault(); return; }
30084:             if (closeButton) { closePanel({ restoreFocus: true }); return; }
30085:             if (tabButton) { setActiveTab(tabButton.dataset.tab); return; }
30086:             if (uiThemeButton) { applyUiTheme(uiThemeButton.dataset.uiTheme, true); return; }
30087:             if (themeButton) { applyTheme(themeButton.dataset.theme, true); return; }
30088:             if (toggleButton) { toggleFeature(toggleButton.dataset.toggle); return; }
30089:             if (positionButton) { applyPosition(positionButton.dataset.position, true); return; }
30090:             if (actionButton) {
30091:                 event.preventDefault();
30092:                 handleAction(actionButton);
30093:                 return;
30094:             }
30095:         });
30096:         panel.addEventListener('change', event => handleSettingChange(event.target));
30097:         const dragHandle = panel.querySelector('.mcms-drag-handle');
30098:         if (dragHandle) {
30099:             dragHandle.addEventListener('mousedown', startPanelDrag, true);
30100:             dragHandle.addEventListener('touchstart', startPanelDrag, { capture: true, passive: false });
30101:         }
30102:         ['click', 'dblclick', 'mousedown', 'mouseup', 'mousemove', 'wheel', 'contextmenu', 'touchstart', 'touchmove', 'touchend'].forEach(eventName => {
30103:             panel.addEventListener(eventName, event => event.stopPropagation(), { passive: false });
30104:         });
30105:         document.body.appendChild(panel);
30106:         const importInput = panel.querySelector('[data-import-config-file]');
30107:         if (importInput) {
30108:             importInput.addEventListener('change', () => {
30109:                 const file = importInput.files?.[0];
30110:                 if (file) importToolkitConfigFile(file);
30111:                 importInput.value = '';
30112:             });
30113:         }
30114:         const financeImportInput = panel.querySelector('[data-import-finance-file]');
30115:         if (financeImportInput) {
30116:             financeImportInput.addEventListener('change', () => {
30117:                 const file = financeImportInput.files?.[0];
30118:                 if (file) importFinancialArchiveFile(file);
30119:                 financeImportInput.value = '';
30120:             });
30121:         }
30122:         renderQuickPlaces();
30123:         renderBookmarks();
30124:         renderProfiles();
30125:         updateUI();
30126:         recordStartupMetric('settingsPanelBuildMs', panelStartedAt, { settingsPanelLazy: true });
30127:         return panel;
30128:     }
30129: 
30130:     function renderQuickPlaces() {
30131:         const list = document.querySelector(`#${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-quick-list`);
30132:         if (!list) return;
30133:         list.innerHTML = QUICK_PLACES.map(place => `
30134:             <div class="mcms-quick-row">
30135:                 <button class="mcms-place-main" type="button" data-action="place-go" data-place="${place.id}" title="Jump to ${escapeHtml(place.name)}">
30136:                     <span class="mcms-iconbox">⌖</span><span class="mcms-text"><span class="mcms-label">${escapeHtml(place.name)}</span><span class="mcms-pill">${place.label}</span></span>
30137:                 </button>
30138:                 <button class="mcms-pin-btn ${state.quickPins[place.id] ? 'mcms-on' : ''}" type="button" data-action="quick-pin" data-place="${place.id}" title="Pin as persistent screen shortcut">${state.quickPins[place.id] ? 'ON' : 'PIN'}</button>
30139:             </div>
30140:         `).join('');
30141:     }
30142: 
30143:     function renderBookmarks() {
30144:         const list = document.querySelector(`#${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-bookmark-list`);
30145:         if (!list) return;
30146:         list.innerHTML = state.bookmarks.map((bookmark, index) => {
30147:             if (!bookmark) {
30148:                 return `<div class="mcms-bookmark-row"><span class="mcms-bookmark-name">Slot ${index + 1} empty</span><span></span><span></span><button class="mcms-bookmark-btn" type="button" data-action="bookmark-save" data-slot="${index}">Save</button><span></span></div>`;
30149:             }
30150:             const screenLabel = bookmarkScreenLabel(bookmark);
30151:             const labelMode = bookmark.shortLabel ? 'CUSTOM' : 'AUTO';
30152:             const labelTitle = `${bookmark.name} · Screen label: ${screenLabel} (${labelMode.toLowerCase()})`;
30153:             return `
30154:                 <div class="mcms-bookmark-row">
30155:                     <button class="mcms-bookmark-name mcms-bookmark-name-btn" type="button" data-action="bookmark-label" data-slot="${index}" title="${escapeHtml(labelTitle)}" aria-label="Edit ${escapeHtml(bookmark.name)} name and short label">
30156:                         <span class="mcms-bookmark-name-main">${escapeHtml(bookmark.name)}</span>
30157:                         <span class="mcms-bookmark-short">${escapeHtml(screenLabel)} · ${labelMode}</span>
30158:                     </button>
30159:                     <button class="mcms-bookmark-btn" type="button" data-action="bookmark-go" data-slot="${index}">Go</button>
30160:                     <button class="mcms-pin-btn ${bookmark.pinned ? 'mcms-on' : ''}" type="button" data-action="bookmark-pin" data-slot="${index}" title="Pin as persistent screen shortcut">${bookmark.pinned ? 'ON' : 'PIN'}</button>
30161:                     <button class="mcms-bookmark-btn" type="button" data-action="bookmark-save" data-slot="${index}" title="Update this bookmark from the current map view">Save</button>
30162:                     <button class="mcms-bookmark-btn" type="button" data-action="bookmark-delete" data-slot="${index}">×</button>
30163:                 </div>`;
30164:         }).join('');
30165:     }
30166: 
30167:     function renderScreenPins() {
30168:         const dock = document.querySelector(`#${SCRIPT.controlId} .mcms-screen-pins`);
30169:         if (!dock) return;
30170:         const entries = [];
30171:         for (const place of QUICK_PLACES) {
30172:             if (!state.quickPins[place.id]) continue;
30173:             entries.push({
30174:                 kind: 'quick',
30175:                 id: place.id,
30176:                 fullName: place.name,
30177:                 baseLabel: sanitiseBookmarkShortLabel(place.label) || makeSmartBookmarkLabel(place.name)
30178:             });
30179:         }
30180:         state.bookmarks.forEach((bookmark, index) => {
30181:             if (!bookmark || !bookmark.pinned) return;
30182:             entries.push({
30183:                 kind: 'bookmark',
30184:                 index,
30185:                 fullName: bookmark.name,
30186:                 baseLabel: bookmarkScreenLabel(bookmark)
30187:             });
30188:         });
30189:         dock.innerHTML = resolveScreenPinLabels(entries).map(entry => {
30190:             const action = entry.kind === 'quick'
30191:                 ? `data-action="place-go" data-place="${escapeHtml(entry.id)}"`
30192:                 : `data-action="bookmark-go" data-slot="${entry.index}"`;
30193:             const className = entry.kind === 'quick' ? 'mcms-pin-quick' : 'mcms-pin-custom';
30194:             return `<button class="mcms-screen-pin-btn ${className}" type="button" ${action} data-full-label="${escapeHtml(entry.fullName)}" data-smart-label="${escapeHtml(entry.label)}" title="Jump to ${escapeHtml(entry.fullName)}" aria-label="Jump to ${escapeHtml(entry.fullName)}">${escapeHtml(entry.label)}</button>`;
30195:         }).join('');
30196:         if (isTouchLayoutActive()) fitControlToMap();
30197:     }
30198: 
30199:     function handleAction(button) {
30200:         const action = button.dataset.action;
30201:         if (action === 'place-go') {
30202:             const place = QUICK_PLACES.find(item => item.id === button.dataset.place);
30203:             if (place && setMapView(place.lat, place.lng, place.zoom)) showToast(place.name);
30204:             return;
30205:         }
30206:         if (action === 'quick-pin') { toggleQuickPin(button.dataset.place); return; }
30207:         if (action === 'bookmark-save') { saveBookmark(Number(button.dataset.slot)); return; }
30208:         if (action === 'bookmark-label') { editBookmarkLabel(Number(button.dataset.slot)); return; }
30209:         if (action === 'bookmark-go') { goBookmark(Number(button.dataset.slot)); return; }
30210:         if (action === 'bookmark-delete') { deleteBookmark(Number(button.dataset.slot)); return; }
30211:         if (action === 'bookmark-pin') { toggleBookmarkPin(Number(button.dataset.slot)); return; }
30212:         if (action === 'nudge-left') { nudgeControl(-4, 0); return; }
30213:         if (action === 'nudge-right') { nudgeControl(4, 0); return; }
30214:         if (action === 'nudge-up') { nudgeControl(0, -4); return; }
30215:         if (action === 'nudge-down') { nudgeControl(0, 4); return; }
30216:         if (action === 'nudge-reset') { resetNudge(); return; }
30217:         if (action === 'panel-left') { nudgePanel(-24, 0); return; }
30218:         if (action === 'panel-right') { nudgePanel(24, 0); return; }
30219:         if (action === 'panel-up') { nudgePanel(0, -24); return; }
30220:         if (action === 'panel-down') { nudgePanel(0, 24); return; }
30221:         if (action === 'open-help-center') { openHelpCenter(); return; }
30222:         if (action === 'toggle-economy') { setEconomyMode(!state.economyMode, true); return; }
30223:         if (action === 'open-critical-drawer') { toggleCriticalDrawer(); return; }
30224:         if (action === 'open-vehicle-status') { toggleVehicleCodeStatus(); return; }
30225:         if (action === 'fit-critical') { fitCriticalMissions(); return; }
30226:         if (action === 'scan-transport-sweep') { const queue = buildTransportSweepQueue(); showToast(queue.length ? `${queue.length} transport mission${queue.length === 1 ? '' : 's'} found` : 'No alliance patient transports found'); return; }
30227:         if (action === 'start-transport-sweep') { startTransportSweep(); return; }
30228:         if (action === 'stop-transport-sweep') { stopTransportSweep(); return; }
30229:         if (action === 'reset-session') { resetSessionPerformance(); return; }
30230:         if (action === 'clear-payout-history') { clearPayoutHistory(); return; }
30231:         if (action === 'critical-go') { focusMissionById(button.dataset.missionId, false); return; }
30232:         if (action === 'profile-save') { saveMapProfile(Number(button.dataset.slot)); return; }
30233:         if (action === 'profile-load') { loadMapProfile(Number(button.dataset.slot)); return; }
30234:         if (action === 'profile-delete') { deleteMapProfile(Number(button.dataset.slot)); return; }
30235:         if (action === 'export-config') { exportToolkitConfig(); return; }
30236:         if (action === 'import-config') { document.querySelector(`#${SCRIPT.panelId} [data-import-config-file]`)?.click?.(); return; }
30237:         if (action === 'reset-config') { resetToolkitConfiguration(); return; }
30238:         if (action === 'discord-test') { testDiscordWebhook(); return; }
30239:         if (action === 'discord-generate-post') { postDiscordFinancialReport(); return; }
30240:         if (action === 'discord-clear') { clearDiscordWebhook(); return; }
30241:         if (action === 'finance-archive-scan') { scanFinancialArchive(); return; }
30242:         if (action === 'finance-archive-cancel') { cancelFinancialArchiveScan(); return; }
30243:         if (action === 'finance-archive-export') { exportFinancialArchive(); return; }
30244:         if (action === 'finance-archive-import') { document.querySelector(`#${SCRIPT.panelId} [data-import-finance-file]`)?.click?.(); return; }
30245:         if (action === 'finance-archive-clear') { clearFinancialArchive(); return; }
30246:         if (action === 'finance-rules-refresh') { refreshFinancialIntelligenceFeeds(true).then(() => { renderFinanceVaultStatus(); showToast('GitHub financial intelligence refreshed'); }); return; }
30247:         if (action === 'test-payout-flash') {
30248:             const testAmount = Math.max(1000, Number(document.querySelector(`#${SCRIPT.panelId} [data-setting="payout-test-amount"]`)?.value) || state.payoutFlash.threshold);
30249:             const triggered = triggerPayoutFlash(testAmount, true, { source: 'personal', caption: 'Emergency Response Test' });
30250:             showToast(triggered ? 'Emergency flash test' : 'Emergency flash unavailable: map not detected');
30251:             return;
30252:         }
30253:         if (action === 'panel-reset') resetPanelPosition();
30254:     }
30255:     function handleDiscordFinancialSettingChange(target, setting) {
30256:         if (setting === 'discord-webhook') {
30257:             try {
30258:                 saveDiscordWebhookUrl(target.value);
30259:                 setDiscordStatus(target.value ? 'Webhook saved securely in Tampermonkey storage.' : 'Webhook removed.', 'good');
30260:             } catch (err) {
30261:                 setDiscordStatus(err?.message || 'Webhook URL is invalid.', 'bad');
30262:             }
30263:             return true;
30264:         }
30265:         if (setting === 'discord-name') {
30266:             state.discordReport.webhookName = String(target.value || 'MissionChief Finance').trim().slice(0, 80) || 'MissionChief Finance';
30267:             saveState(); updateUI();
30268:             return true;
30269:         }
30270:         if (setting === 'discord-top-categories') {
30271:             state.discordReport.topCategories = [3, 5, 8].includes(Number(target.value)) ? Number(target.value) : 5;
30272:             invalidateDiscordFinancialPreview();
30273:             saveState(); updateUI();
30274:             return true;
30275:         }
30276:         if (setting === 'discord-period') {
30277:             state.discordReport.period = ['today', 'yesterday', 'last24', 'last7', 'last30', 'last90', 'last180', 'last365', 'allAvailable', 'session', 'sinceLast', 'custom'].includes(target.value) ? target.value : 'today';
30278:             invalidateDiscordFinancialPreview();
30279:             saveState(); updateUI();
30280:             return true;
30281:         }
30282:         if (setting === 'discord-custom-start' || setting === 'discord-custom-end') {
30283:             const key = setting === 'discord-custom-start' ? 'customStart' : 'customEnd';
30284:             if (/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/u.test(String(target.value || ''))) state.discordReport[key] = String(target.value);
30285:             invalidateDiscordFinancialPreview();
30286:             saveState(); updateUI();
30287:             return true;
30288:         }
30289:         if (setting === 'discord-comparison') {
30290:             state.discordReport.includeComparison = String(target.value) !== 'false';
30291:             invalidateDiscordFinancialPreview();
30292:             saveState(); updateUI();
30293:             return true;
30294:         }
30295:         if (setting === 'discord-chart') {
30296:             state.discordReport.includeChart = String(target.value) !== 'false';
30297:             invalidateDiscordFinancialPreview();
30298:             saveState(); updateUI();
30299:             return true;
30300:         }
30301:         if (setting === 'discord-report-mode') {
30302:             state.discordReport.reportMode = ['executive', 'fullAudit'].includes(String(target.value)) ? String(target.value) : 'fullAudit';
30303:             invalidateDiscordFinancialPreview();
30304:             saveState(); updateUI();
30305:             return true;
30306:         }
30307:         if (setting === 'discord-risk' || setting === 'discord-forecast') {
30308:             const key = setting === 'discord-risk' ? 'includeRisk' : 'includeForecast';
30309:             state.discordReport[key] = String(target.value) !== 'false';
30310:             invalidateDiscordFinancialPreview();
30311:             saveState(); updateUI();
30312:             return true;
30313:         }
30314:         if (setting === 'finance-vault-enabled') {
30315:             state.financialVault.enabled = String(target.value) !== 'false';
30316:             saveState(); updateUI();
30317:             setFinanceVaultStatus(state.financialVault.enabled ? 'Local Financial Archive enabled.' : 'Local Financial Archive disabled; reports will scan MissionChief directly without retaining history.', 'neutral');
30318:             return true;
30319:         }
30320:         if (setting === 'finance-vault-retention') {
30321:             state.financialVault.retentionDays = String(target.value) === 'all' ? 'all' : ([90, 180, 365, 730, 1825].includes(Number(target.value)) ? Number(target.value) : 'all');
30322:             saveState(); updateUI(); renderFinanceVaultStatus();
30323:             return true;
30324:         }
30325:         if (setting === 'finance-rule-feed') {
30326:             state.financialVault.ruleFeedEnabled = String(target.value) !== 'false';
30327:             saveState();
30328:             refreshFinancialIntelligenceFeeds(true).then(() => { updateUI(); renderFinanceVaultStatus(); });
30329:             return true;
30330:         }
30331:         return false;
30332:     }
30333:     function handleDeviceLayoutSettingChange(target, setting) {
30334:         const nextValue = ['auto', 'on', 'off'].includes(String(target.value)) ? String(target.value) : 'auto';
30335:         const previousLayout = activeDeviceLayout;
30336:         if (setting === 'mobile-mode') {
30337:             state.mobileMode = nextValue;
30338:             if (nextValue === 'on') state.tabletMode = 'off';
30339:         } else if (setting === 'tablet-mode') {
30340:             state.tabletMode = nextValue;
30341:             if (nextValue === 'on') state.mobileMode = 'off';
30342:         } else return false;
30343:         saveState();
30344:         applyRootAttributes();
30345:         refreshTabletModeUi();
30346:         if (previousLayout !== activeDeviceLayout && !isTouchLayoutActive()) {
30347:             clearTabletPanelSizing();
30348:             clearTabletDockSizing();
30349:         }
30350:         fitControlToMap();
30351:         positionPanelOverlay(true);
30352:         showToast(activeDeviceLayout === 'mobile' ? 'iOS Mobile Mode active' : activeDeviceLayout === 'tablet' ? 'Tablet Mode active' : 'Desktop layout active');
30353:         return true; }
30354:     function handleSettingChange(target) {
30355:         if (handleOperationalWindowSettingChange(target)) return;
30356:         const setting = target.dataset.setting;
30357:         if (!setting) return;
30358:         if (handleDeviceLayoutSettingChange(target, setting)) return;
30359:         if (setting === 'major-incident-minimum') {
30360:             state.majorIncidentFeed.minimumCredits = MAJOR_INCIDENT_FEED_MINIMUM_OPTIONS.includes(Number(target.value)) ? Number(target.value) : 25000;
30361:             saveState();
30362:             updateUI();
30363:             refreshMissionSnapshots();
30364:             scheduleMajorIncidentFeedRender(0);
30365:             showToast(`Major Incident Feed: ${formatOperationalCompactCredits(state.majorIncidentFeed.minimumCredits)}+ credits`);
30366:             return;
30367:         }
30368:         if (setting === 'coverage-radius') {
30369:             state.coverage.radiusMi = Number(target.value) || 10;
30370:             saveState();
30371:             updateUI();
30372:             scheduleCoverageRefresh();
30373:             return;
30374:         }
30375:         if (setting === 'heatmap-source') state.heatmap.source = target.value === 'vehicles' ? 'vehicles' : 'stations';
30376:         if (setting === 'heatmap-service') state.heatmap.service = ['all', 'fire', 'ambulance', 'police', 'air', 'water'].includes(target.value) ? target.value : 'all';
30377:         if (setting === 'heatmap-radius') state.heatmap.radiusMi = Number(target.value) || 10;
30378:         if (setting === 'heatmap-opacity') state.heatmap.opacity = clamp(target.value, 0.12, 0.55, 0.30);
30379:         if (setting.startsWith('heatmap-')) {
30380:             saveState(); updateUI(); scheduleHeatmapRefresh(); return;
30381:         }
30382:         if (setting === 'transport-sweep-delay') {
30383:             state.transportSweep.delayMs = TRANSPORT_SWEEP_DELAY_OPTIONS.includes(Number(target.value)) ? Number(target.value) : 2000;
30384:             saveState(); updateUI();
30385:             showToast(`Transport Sweep delay: ${state.transportSweep.delayMs / 1000}s`);
30386:             return;
30387:         }
30388:         if (setting === 'transport-sweep-max') {
30389:             state.transportSweep.maxPerRun = Math.round(clamp(target.value, 1, TRANSPORT_SWEEP_MAX_REQUESTS, 25));
30390:             saveState(); updateUI();
30391:             showToast(`Transport Sweep maximum: ${state.transportSweep.maxPerRun}`);
30392:             return;
30393:         }
30394:         if (setting === 'resource-gap-radius') {
30395:             state.resourceGap.radiusMi = RESOURCE_GAP_RADIUS_OPTIONS.includes(Number(target.value)) ? Number(target.value) : 25;
30396:             resourceGapAnalysisCache.clear();
30397:             saveState(); updateUI(); scheduleResourceGapRefresh(0); refreshVisibleMissionInspector();
30398:             showToast(`Resource Gap radius: ${state.resourceGap.radiusMi}mi`);
30399:             return;
30400:         }
30401:         if (setting === 'stuck-threshold') {
30402:             state.stuckDetector.thresholdMin = Math.round(clamp(target.value, STUCK_MIN_MINUTES, STUCK_MAX_MINUTES, 20));
30403:             saveState();
30404:             updateUI();
30405:             scheduleStuckMissionRefresh(0);
30406:             showToast(`Stuck missions: ${state.stuckDetector.thresholdMin} minutes`);
30407:             return;
30408:         }
30409:         if (setting === 'alliance-credit-minimum') {
30410:             state.allianceCreditMinimum = [0, 5000, 10000, 15000, 20000].includes(Number(target.value)) ? Number(target.value) : 0;
30411:             saveState();
30412:             updateUI();
30413:             scheduleAllianceCreditRefresh(0);
30414:             showToast(state.allianceCreditMinimum ? `Alliance credits: ${state.allianceCreditMinimum / 1000}K+` : 'Alliance credits: all values');
30415:             return;
30416:         }
30417:         if (handleDiscordFinancialSettingChange(target, setting)) return;
30418:         if (setting === 'payout-template') {
30419:             state.payoutFlash.template = PAYOUT_TEMPLATES[target.value] ? target.value : 'gta5';
30420:             disposePayoutMediaAudio();
30421:             saveState();
30422:             updateUI();
30423:             const hostedCue = PAYOUT_MEDIA_SOUNDS[state.payoutFlash.template];
30424:             showToast(hostedCue
30425:                 ? `${payoutTemplateMeta(state.payoutFlash.template).label} · ${hostedCue.label} ready`
30426:                 : `${payoutTemplateMeta(state.payoutFlash.template).label} payout template`);
30427:             return;
30428:         }
30429:         if (setting === 'payout-threshold') {
30430:             state.payoutFlash.threshold = Math.round(clamp(target.value, 1000, 1000000000, 10000));
30431:             saveState();
30432:             updateUI();
30433:             showToast(`Payout flash: ${state.payoutFlash.threshold.toLocaleString()}+`);
30434:             return;
30435:         }
30436:         if (setting === 'payout-duration') {
30437:             state.payoutFlash.durationMs = normalisePayoutFlashDuration(Number(target.value) * 1000);
30438:             saveState();
30439:             updateUI();
30440:             showToast(`Payout flash: ${state.payoutFlash.durationMs / 1000} seconds`);
30441:             return;
30442:         }
30443:         if (setting === 'payout-volume') {
30444:             state.payoutFlash.soundVolume = clamp(target.value, 0, 1, 0.35);
30445:             if (payoutMediaAudio && !payoutMediaAudio.paused) payoutMediaAudio.volume = state.payoutFlash.soundVolume;
30446:             saveState();
30447:             updateUI();
30448:             return;
30449:         }
30450:         if (setting === 'payout-test-amount') return;
30451:         if (setting === 'auto-night-start') state.autoNight.nightStart = target.value || '19:00';
30452:         if (setting === 'auto-day-start') state.autoNight.dayStart = target.value || '07:00';
30453:         if (setting === 'auto-night-theme') state.autoNight.nightTheme = normaliseTheme(target.value);
30454:         if (setting === 'auto-day-theme') state.autoNight.dayTheme = normaliseTheme(target.value);
30455:         if (setting.startsWith('auto-')) {
30456:             state.autoNight.lastBucket = '';
30457:             saveState();
30458:             runAutoNight(true);
30459:             updateUI();
30460:         }
30461:     }
30462:     function updateUI() {
30463:         applyRootAttributes();
30464:         operationalWindowSyncSettingsUi();
30465:         if (operationalSuiteEnabled()) scheduleOperationalSuiteScan(0);
30466:         if (state.majorIncidentFeed.enabled && operationalStartupComplete) scheduleMajorIncidentFeedRender(40);
30467:         else if (!state.majorIncidentFeed.enabled) removeMajorIncidentFeed();
30468:         const control = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.controlId);
30469:         const panel = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.panelId);
30470:         if (control) {
30471:             for (const pos of Object.keys(POSITIONS)) control.classList.toggle(`mcms-pos-${pos}`, state.position === pos);
30472:             control.style.setProperty('--mcms-nudge-x', `${state.nudge.x}px`);
30473:             control.style.setProperty('--mcms-nudge-y', `${state.nudge.y}px`);
30474:             const controlToggleValues = {
30475:                 allianceMissions: state.visibility.allianceMissions,
30476:                 myMissions: state.visibility.myMissions,
30477:                 vehicles: state.visibility.vehicles,
30478:                 buildings: state.visibility.buildings,
30479:                 allianceCredits: state.allianceCredits,
30480:                 missionAge: state.missionAge,
30481:                 transportWatcher: state.transportWatcher,
30482:                 unitCommitment: state.unitCommitment,
30483:                 criticalView: criticalViewActive
30484:             };
30485:             control.querySelectorAll('[data-toggle]').forEach(btn => {
30486:                 const on = Boolean(controlToggleValues[btn.dataset.toggle]);
30487:                 btn.classList.toggle('mcms-on', on);
30488:                 btn.setAttribute('aria-pressed', String(on));
30489:                 btn.dataset.mcmsState = on ? 'on' : 'off';
30490:             });
30491:             const vehicleStatusButton = control.querySelector('[data-action="open-vehicle-status"]');
30492:             if (vehicleStatusButton) {
30493:                 const open = Boolean(document.getElementById(SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId)?.classList?.contains('mcms-open'));
30494:                 vehicleStatusButton.classList.toggle('mcms-on', open);
30495:                 vehicleStatusButton.setAttribute('aria-pressed', String(open));
30496:                 vehicleStatusButton.dataset.mcmsState = open ? 'on' : 'off';
30497:             }
30498:             const missionAgeWatchButton = control.querySelector('[data-action="open-critical-drawer"]');
30499:             if (missionAgeWatchButton) {
30500:                 const open = Boolean(document.getElementById(SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId)?.classList?.contains('mcms-open'));
30501:                 missionAgeWatchButton.classList.toggle('mcms-on', open);
30502:                 missionAgeWatchButton.setAttribute('aria-pressed', String(open));
30503:                 missionAgeWatchButton.dataset.mcmsState = open ? 'on' : 'off';
30504:             }
30505:             const economyButton = control.querySelector('.mcms-economy-btn');
30506:             if (economyButton) {
30507:                 const on = Boolean(state.economyMode);
30508:                 const label = on ? 'Disable Economy Mode' : 'Enable Economy Mode';
30509:                 economyButton.classList.toggle('mcms-on', on);
30510:                 economyButton.setAttribute('aria-pressed', String(on));
30511:                 economyButton.setAttribute('aria-label', label);
30512:                 economyButton.title = label;
30513:                 economyButton.dataset.mcmsState = on ? 'on' : 'off';
30514:             }
30515:             const dockToggleButton = control.querySelector('.mcms-dock-toggle-btn');
30516:             if (dockToggleButton) {
30517:                 const open = state.commandBarOpen !== false;
30518:                 const label = open ? 'Collapse command bar' : 'Expand command bar';
30519:                 dockToggleButton.classList.toggle('mcms-open', open);
30520:                 dockToggleButton.setAttribute('aria-expanded', String(open));
30521:                 dockToggleButton.setAttribute('aria-label', label);
30522:                 dockToggleButton.title = label;
30523:                 const icon = dockToggleButton.querySelector('.mcms-dock-toggle-icon');
30524:                 if (icon) icon.textContent = open ? '▴' : '▾';
30525:             }
30526:         }
30527:         if (!panel) return;
30528:         refreshTabletModeUi(panel);
30529:         panel.querySelectorAll('.mcms-tab-btn').forEach(btn => {
30530:             const active = btn.dataset.tab === state.activeTab;
30531:             btn.classList.toggle('mcms-active', active);
30532:             btn.setAttribute('aria-selected', String(active));
30533:             btn.tabIndex = active ? 0 : -1;
30534:         });
30535:         panel.querySelectorAll('.mcms-tab-panel').forEach(tabPanel => {
30536:             const active = tabPanel.dataset.panel === state.activeTab;
30537:             tabPanel.classList.toggle('mcms-active', active);
30538:             tabPanel.hidden = !active;
30539:         });
30540:         const panelOpen = panel.classList.contains('mcms-open');
30541:         panel.setAttribute('aria-hidden', String(!panelOpen));
30542:         control?.querySelector('.mcms-menu-btn')?.setAttribute('aria-expanded', String(panelOpen));
30543:         panel.querySelectorAll('.mcms-ui-theme-btn').forEach(btn => {
30544:             const active = btn.dataset.uiTheme === state.uiTheme;
30545:             btn.classList.toggle('mcms-active', active);
30546:             btn.setAttribute('aria-pressed', String(active));
30547:         });
30548:         panel.querySelectorAll('.mcms-theme-btn').forEach(btn => btn.classList.toggle('mcms-active', btn.dataset.theme === state.theme));
30549:         panel.querySelectorAll('.mcms-position-btn').forEach(btn => btn.classList.toggle('mcms-active', btn.dataset.position === state.position));
30550:         const toggleValues = {
30551:             clean: state.cleanMode,
30552:             markerFocus: state.markerFocus,
30553:             missionPulse: state.missionPulse,
30554:             roadPriority: state.roadPriority,
30555:             coverage: state.coverage.enabled,
30556:             heatmap: state.heatmap.enabled,
30557:             shortcuts: state.shortcuts,
30558:             autoLoadAllVehicles: state.autoLoadAllVehicles,
30559:             allianceBuildingsMapBlocker: state.allianceBuildingsMap === false,
30560:             majorIncidentFeed: state.majorIncidentFeed.enabled,
30561:             missionLockAudio: state.missionLockAudio,
30562:             autoNight: state.autoNight.enabled,
30563:             payoutFlash: state.payoutFlash.enabled,
30564:             payoutSound: state.payoutFlash.soundEnabled,
30565:             missionInspector: state.missionInspector,
30566:             missionValue: state.missionValue,
30567:             customVehicleBadges: state.customVehicleBadges,
30568:             stuckDetector: state.stuckDetector.enabled,
30569:             missionSpawn: state.missionSpawn.enabled,
30570:             resourceGap: state.resourceGap.enabled,
30571:             allianceMissions: state.visibility.allianceMissions,
30572:             myMissions: state.visibility.myMissions,
30573:             vehicles: state.visibility.vehicles,
30574:             buildings: state.visibility.buildings,
30575:             allianceCredits: state.allianceCredits,
30576:             missionAge: state.missionAge,
30577:             transportWatcher: state.transportWatcher,
30578:             unitCommitment: state.unitCommitment,
30579:             criticalView: criticalViewActive
30580:         };
30581:         panel.querySelectorAll('[data-toggle]').forEach(btn => {
30582:             const key = btn.dataset.toggle;
30583:             const on = Boolean(toggleValues[key]);
30584:             btn.classList.toggle('mcms-on', on);
30585:             const pill = btn.querySelector('.mcms-pill');
30586:             if (pill) pill.textContent = key === 'coverage' ? (on ? `${state.coverage.radiusMi}mi` : 'OFF') : key === 'heatmap' ? (on ? `${state.heatmap.radiusMi}mi` : 'OFF') : (on ? 'ON' : 'OFF');
30587:         });
30588:         const majorIncidentMinimum = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="major-incident-minimum"]');
30589:         if (majorIncidentMinimum) majorIncidentMinimum.value = String(state.majorIncidentFeed.minimumCredits);
30590:         const radius = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="coverage-radius"]');
30591:         if (radius) radius.value = String(state.coverage.radiusMi);
30592:         const heatmapSource = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="heatmap-source"]');
30593:         if (heatmapSource) heatmapSource.value = state.heatmap.source;
30594:         const heatmapService = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="heatmap-service"]');
30595:         if (heatmapService) heatmapService.value = state.heatmap.service;
30596:         const heatmapRadius = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="heatmap-radius"]');
30597:         if (heatmapRadius) heatmapRadius.value = String(state.heatmap.radiusMi);
30598:         const heatmapOpacity = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="heatmap-opacity"]');
30599:         if (heatmapOpacity) heatmapOpacity.value = String(state.heatmap.opacity);
30600:         const allianceCreditMinimum = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="alliance-credit-minimum"]');
30601:         if (allianceCreditMinimum) allianceCreditMinimum.value = String(state.allianceCreditMinimum);
30602:         const transportSweepDelay = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="transport-sweep-delay"]');
30603:         if (transportSweepDelay) transportSweepDelay.value = String(state.transportSweep.delayMs);
30604:         const transportSweepMax = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="transport-sweep-max"]');
30605:         if (transportSweepMax) transportSweepMax.value = String(state.transportSweep.maxPerRun);
30606:         if (panel.classList.contains('mcms-open') && state.activeTab === 'resources') renderTransportSweepPanel();
30607:         const payoutTemplate = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="payout-template"]');
30608:         if (payoutTemplate) payoutTemplate.value = state.payoutFlash.template;
30609:         const resourceGapRadius = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="resource-gap-radius"]'); if (resourceGapRadius) resourceGapRadius.value = String(state.resourceGap.radiusMi);
30610:         const stuckThreshold = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="stuck-threshold"]');
30611:         if (stuckThreshold) stuckThreshold.value = String(state.stuckDetector.thresholdMin);
30612:         const payoutThreshold = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="payout-threshold"]');
30613:         if (payoutThreshold) payoutThreshold.value = String(state.payoutFlash.threshold);
30614:         const payoutDuration = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="payout-duration"]');
30615:         if (payoutDuration) payoutDuration.value = String(state.payoutFlash.durationMs / 1000);
30616:         const payoutVolume = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="payout-volume"]');
30617:         if (payoutVolume) payoutVolume.value = String(state.payoutFlash.soundVolume);
30618:         const discordWebhook = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="discord-webhook"]');
30619:         if (discordWebhook && document.activeElement !== discordWebhook) discordWebhook.value = getDiscordWebhookUrl();
30620:         const discordName = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="discord-name"]');
30621:         if (discordName && document.activeElement !== discordName) discordName.value = state.discordReport.webhookName;
30622:         const discordTopCategories = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="discord-top-categories"]');
30623:         if (discordTopCategories) discordTopCategories.value = String(state.discordReport.topCategories);
30624:         const discordPeriod = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="discord-period"]');
30625:         if (discordPeriod) discordPeriod.value = state.discordReport.period;
30626:         const discordCustomStart = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="discord-custom-start"]');
30627:         if (discordCustomStart && document.activeElement !== discordCustomStart) discordCustomStart.value = state.discordReport.customStart;
30628:         const discordCustomEnd = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="discord-custom-end"]');
30629:         if (discordCustomEnd && document.activeElement !== discordCustomEnd) discordCustomEnd.value = state.discordReport.customEnd;
30630:         const discordComparison = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="discord-comparison"]');
30631:         if (discordComparison) discordComparison.value = String(state.discordReport.includeComparison);
30632:         const discordChart = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="discord-chart"]');
30633:         if (discordChart) discordChart.value = String(state.discordReport.includeChart);
30634:         const discordReportMode = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="discord-report-mode"]');
30635:         if (discordReportMode) discordReportMode.value = state.discordReport.reportMode;
30636:         const discordRisk = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="discord-risk"]');
30637:         if (discordRisk) discordRisk.value = String(state.discordReport.includeRisk);
30638:         const discordForecast = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="discord-forecast"]');
30639:         if (discordForecast) discordForecast.value = String(state.discordReport.includeForecast);
30640:         const financeVaultEnabled = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="finance-vault-enabled"]');
30641:         if (financeVaultEnabled) financeVaultEnabled.value = String(state.financialVault.enabled);
30642:         const financeVaultRetention = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="finance-vault-retention"]');
30643:         if (financeVaultRetention) financeVaultRetention.value = String(state.financialVault.retentionDays);
30644:         const financeRuleFeed = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="finance-rule-feed"]');
30645:         if (financeRuleFeed) financeRuleFeed.value = String(state.financialVault.ruleFeedEnabled);
30646:         setDiscordStatus(discordFinanceStatus, discordFinanceStatusTone);
30647:         if (panel.classList.contains('mcms-open') && state.activeTab === 'discord') renderFinanceVaultStatus();
30648:         const nightStart = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="auto-night-start"]');
30649:         if (nightStart) nightStart.value = state.autoNight.nightStart;
30650:         const dayStart = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="auto-day-start"]');
30651:         if (dayStart) dayStart.value = state.autoNight.dayStart;
30652:         const nightTheme = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="auto-night-theme"]');
30653:         if (nightTheme) nightTheme.value = state.autoNight.nightTheme;
30654:         const dayTheme = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="auto-day-theme"]');
30655:         if (dayTheme) dayTheme.value = state.autoNight.dayTheme;
30656:         const economyStatus = panel.querySelector('.mcms-economy-status');
30657:         if (economyStatus) economyStatus.textContent = state.economyMode
30658:             ? 'Economy Mode is ON: static visual effects, adaptive refresh intervals and off-screen vehicle/building layer culling are active.'
30659:             : 'Economy Mode is OFF. Use the leaf button beside the map-menu opener to reduce CPU, GPU and marker workload.';
30660:         const nudge = panel.querySelector('.mcms-nudge-value');
30661:         if (nudge) nudge.textContent = `X ${state.nudge.x} / Y ${state.nudge.y}`;
30662:         if (panel.classList.contains('mcms-open') && state.activeTab === 'settings') renderProfiles();
30663:         if ((panel.classList.contains('mcms-open') && state.activeTab === 'ops') || operationalUiIsVisible()) renderOperationalPanels();
30664:     }
30665:     function ensureUi() {
30666:         operationalWindowEnsureSettingsStyle(document);
30667:         const mapEl = getLargestLeafletMap();
30668:         const control = createControl(mapEl);
30669:         if (settingsPanelActivated && !document.getElementById(SCRIPT.panelId)) createPanel();
30670:         if (control) ensureVersionStatusButton();
30671:         if (mapEl) {
30672:             const map = findLeafletMapInstance(false);
30673:             if (state.economyMode && map) { applyLeafletEconomyPolicy(map); scheduleEconomyLayerSync(0); }
30674:             if (state.majorIncidentFeed.enabled && operationalStartupComplete) scheduleMajorIncidentFeedRender(0);
30675:             else if (!state.majorIncidentFeed.enabled) removeMajorIncidentFeed();
30676:             const payoutOverlay = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.payoutFlashId);
30677:             if (payoutOverlay?.classList.contains('mcms-payout-active')) positionPayoutFlashOverlay(payoutOverlay, mapEl);
30678:         }
30679:         return Boolean(control || document.getElementById(SCRIPT.controlId));
30680:     }
30681: 
30682:     function mutationBelongsToToolkit(mutation) {
30683:         const target = mutation.target;
30684:         const toolkitTarget = Boolean(
30685:             target &&
30686:             target.nodeType === 1 &&
30687:             (
30688:                 target.id === SCRIPT.controlId ||
30689:                 target.id === SCRIPT.panelId ||
30690:                 target.id === SCRIPT.toastId ||
30691:                 target.id === SCRIPT.payoutFlashId ||
30692:                 target.id === SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId ||
30693:                 target.id === SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId ||
30694:                 target.id === SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId ||
30695:                 target.id === SCRIPT.missionInspectorId ||
30696:                 target.closest?.(`#${SCRIPT.controlId}`) ||
30697:                 target.closest?.(`#${SCRIPT.panelId}`) ||
30698:                 target.closest?.(`#${SCRIPT.toastId}`) ||
30699:                 target.closest?.(`#${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}`) ||
30700:                 target.closest?.(`#${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId}`) ||
30701:                 target.closest?.(`#${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId}`) ||
30702:                 target.closest?.(`#${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId}`) ||
30703:                 target.closest?.(`#${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId}`)
30704:             )
30705:         );
30706:         if (toolkitTarget) return true;
30707:         if (mutation.type === 'attributes' && mutation.attributeName === 'class' && target?.classList) {
30708:             for (const className of target.classList) {
30709:                 if (String(className).startsWith('mcms-')) return true;
30710:             }
30711:         }
30712:         const toolkitSelector = '.mcms-alliance-credit-icon, .mcms-alliance-credit-badge, .mcms-mission-age-icon, .mcms-mission-age-badge, .mcms-unit-commitment-icon, .mcms-unit-commitment-badge, .mcms-transport-watcher-icon, .mcms-transport-watcher-badge, .mcms-resource-gap-icon, .mcms-resource-gap-badge, .mcms-stuck-mission-icon, .mcms-stuck-mission-badge, .mcms-mission-spawn-label-icon, .mcms-mission-spawn-label';
30713:         let elementCount = 0;
30714:         for (const collection of [mutation.addedNodes, mutation.removedNodes]) {
30715:             if (!collection?.length) continue;
30716:             for (const node of collection) {
30717:                 if (!node || node.nodeType !== 1) continue;
30718:                 elementCount += 1;
30719:                 if (!(node.matches?.(toolkitSelector) || node.querySelector?.(toolkitSelector))) return false;
30720:             }
